title: Encoding Categorical Data
content_md:
# Encoding Categories

```python
from sklearn.preprocessing import OneHotEncoder
encoder = OneHotEncoder()
encoded = encoder.fit_transform(df[['gender']])
```

questions.question: What method turns categories into binary columns?
What sklearn class performs one-hot encoding?
What happens if encoding is skipped?
questions.answer: Models may crash or produce wrong patterns.
